chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl. No.1486 of 2024 (Nasir vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Bail Application. 14.10.2024. M/s. Javaid Ahmed Chattari and Saima Shahreen Abbasi, advocate for aplicnat a/w applicant Sardar Shiraz Anjum, advocate for complainant Mr. Khadim Hussain, Addl: PG Sindh O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Complainant, a businessman, allegedly provided animal feed to accused against which he issued two cheques amounting of Rs.16,57,100/-, which were dishonoured and hence this case. 2. Learned Addl: PG has opposed the bail but he has conceded that this is the only case registered against the accused. Learned counsel for the complainant has opposed the bail and submits that accused is a habitual criminal and he has misappropriated amounts of so many other businessmen but apparently there is no such record. 3. The offence is punishable only for three years; the challan has been submitted and reportedly complainant has already filed a civil suit for recovery of the dispute amount. In the circumstances, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant order dated 05.07.2024 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 4. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
